Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestMixin

Packages that use RestMixin
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
 
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    InfoMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /info endpoint: renders the running application's manifest (build/version/git metadata) resolved from the host bean store.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FaviconMixin
    Mixin that serves a favicon.ico icon at /favicon.ico.
    class 
    SeoMixin
    Mixin that serves SEO-conventional endpoints /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
    class 
    VersionMixin
    Mixin that serves deployment-introspection metadata at /version (configurable).
    class 
    WellKnownMixin
    Mixin that serves RFC 8615 /.well-known/* discovery endpoints.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HealthMixin
    Mixin flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DumpsMixin
    Mixin flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
    class 
    LoggersMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MetricsMixin
    Mixin flavor of the /metrics endpoint: renders a Prometheus scrape from a consumer-provided Micrometer MeterRegistry resolved from the host bean store.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops

    Subclasses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ErrorMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [* /error] endpoint.
    class 
    HtdocMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /htdocs/*] static-file endpoint.
    class 
    NavigationMixin
    Mixin providing the group-navigation endpoint ([GET /]) that lists the host resource's child resources.
    class 
    StatsMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /stats] timing-statistics endpoint.

  • Uses of RestMixin in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet with type parameters of type RestMixin
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    RestMixin.Builder<R extends RestMixin,SELF extends RestMixin.Builder<R,SELF>>
    Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
    static final class 
    RestMixin.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestMixin>
    Concrete default leaf builder returned by builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet with type parameters of type RestMixin
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <R extends RestMixin>
    RestMixin.DefaultBuilder<R>
    RestMixin.builder(Class<R> type)
    Creates a new fluent builder for programmatically configuring an instance of the specified mixin type.
